title: phyllanthus serpentinus
intro: Phyllanthus serpentinus, also known as the serpentine tree or serpentine leaf-flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus serpentinus include its potential to treat liver diseases, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
